description: CompositionBlue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironFlaunt your good and bad side with ease in this tantra t-shirt and let the world decide what they think you are - the devil or the angel. The short sleeves and round neck add oodles of attitude, while the graphic print exudes a happy vibe. Team this t-shirt with jeans and mildly heeled sandals and rule the world of party maniacs in style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
